description: Primarily Afro-Caribbean street gang based in Moss Side, Manchester, United Kingdom. Originated from the Pepperhill Crew in the 1980s and named after Dodington Close. Engaged in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, robbery, kidnapping, and murder. Known for rivalries with the Cheetham Hill Gang and Gooch Close Gang, contributing to the 'Gunchester' era. Still active as of the 2000s.
